articles.title: TEST SECURITY RULES LIKE CODE WITH THE FASTLY WAF SIMULATOR
articles.summary: For developers, treating is sacrosanct. In security, it's too often an afterthought - WAF rules are only validated during pentesting... or in an actual attack.

articles.title: → Read more on the Fastly blog
→ Check out the project on GitHub
FARMERS INSURANCE DATA BREACH IMPACTS OVER 1 MILLION PEOPLE
articles.summary: A data breach at Farmers Insurance, disclosed via a third-party vendor, exposed personal information of over one million people, including names and Social Security numbers. The insurer was not directly hacked; the sensitive data was stolen from a compromised external database. Authorities and affected individuals have been notified.

articles.title: DOCKER FIXES CVE-2025-9074, CRITICAL CONTAINER ESCAPE VULNERABILITY WITH CVSS SCORE 9.3
articles.summary: Docker patched a critical container escape flaw (CVSS 9.3) affecting Windows and macOS. The vulnerability (CVE-2025-9074) allowed attackers to access host files from within containers, posing major risks to containerized environments.

articles.title: AUCHAN RETAILER DATA BREACH IMPACTS HUNDREDS OF THOUSANDS OF CUSTOMERS
articles.summary: French retailer Auchan is notifying “several hundred thousand” customers that sensitive data linked to their loyalty accounts was exposed in a cyberattack. The breached data includes names, titles, client status, postal and email addresses, phone numbers, and loyalty card numbers. The company says that no financial details or passwords were impacted.

articles.title: USING TACTICAL AND STRATEGIC ANALYSIS TO TRACK THREAT ACTOR TARGETING
articles.summary: This blog explores how intelligence analysts can distinguish objective victimology from subjective threat actor motivations when reporting on “targeted” sectors. Analysts can ensure consistent, data-driven threat assessments by leveraging standardized industry classifications (ISIC, NACE, and NAICS) and linking tactical evidence to strategic assertions in Synapse. Storm queries help validate that strategic conclusions about targeting are backed by concrete, observable evidence.

articles.title: RAISING SECURITY WITH ORGANIZATION-WIDE YUBIKEY (FIDO2) IN ENTRA ID
articles.summary: Hunt & Hackett details its end-to-end YubiKey FIDO2 rollout for Microsoft Entra ID, using phased conditional access enforcement to mandate phishing-resistant hardware authentication for specific users and actions. Its approach includes automated Temporary Access Pass (TAP) provisioning for onboarding and fallback, access packages for exceptions, and robust monitoring of breakglass accounts. Key lessons include session token control and cross-platform testing prior to full enforcement.

articles.title: SAFEGUARDING VS CODE AGAINST PROMPT INJECTIONS
articles.summary: Prompt injection attacks in VS Code's Copilot Chat could allow malicious actors to leak data or execute code by embedding crafted prompts in GitHub issues. GitHub responded with security improvements like enhanced confirmation flows, tool execution restrictions, and sandboxed environments. The post also recommends Workspace Trust and containerization as defenses, emphasizing the need for ongoing protection as LLM threats evolve.

articles.title: SOME APIS KEEP SECRETS. YOURS MIGHT NOT.
articles.summary: Three years after the Optus breach exposed millions of customer records, Intruder's [13] research team went hunting for the same broken API authorization flaws. They found:

articles.title: Introducing Autoswagger_
AZURE APPHUNTER
articles.summary: Azure AppHunter is an open-source PowerShell tool designed for security researchers, red teamers, and defenders. It identifies excessive or risky permissions granted to Azure Service Principals, helping teams uncover misconfigurations and enforce least privilege.

articles.title: ENTRAROLEREAPER
articles.summary: EntraRoleReaper audits Entra ID users' role assignments by comparing them to actual operations performed over a selected time period. The tool supports least privilege reviews and helps reduce unnecessary role sprawl in Microsoft Entra ID environments.

articles.title: ANTIDEBUG
articles.summary: AntiDebug is a terminal-based tool for testing x86_64 Windows anti-debugging techniques. It provides a hands-on environment for analyzing and understanding various methods malware may use to detect or evade debuggers.

articles.title: PHISHING EMAILS ARE NOW AIMED AT USERS AND AI DEFENSES
articles.summary: Phishing campaigns are now embedding AI prompt injection commands within emails to manipulate automated analysis tools while simultaneously targeting users with credential harvesting tactics. These hidden prompts instruct AI models to enter reasoning loops rather than flag malicious content, increasing the risk of delayed detection or false negatives in SOC workflows. This dual-track approach highlights attackers' growing awareness of AI-based defenses and their efforts to bypass both human and machine detection systems.

articles.title: DOCKER EXPLAINED: FINALLY UNDERSTAND CONTAINERS WITHOUT LOSING YOUR MIND
articles.summary: This guide breaks down Docker in plain terms: containers package code with dependencies to avoid the “works on my machine” problem. It covers key concepts like `Dockerfile` “recipes,” `docker build` commands for creating layered images, registries for storing images, and `docker run` for execution. Containers offer faster, more consistent, isolated, and efficient environments for running applications across systems.

articles.title: INTENT OVER TACTICS: A CISO'S GUIDE TO PROTECTING YOUR CROWN JEWELS
articles.summary: This article outlines a strategic approach to security by identifying and protecting your organization's “crown jewels,” the most critical assets, systems, or people. These may include intellectual property, CI/CD pipelines, backup infrastructure, or key personnel. Instead of reacting to specific attacker tactics, the approach emphasizes understanding attacker intent and designing layered defenses around the assets most likely to be targeted. The process is recursive, expanding protections outward from the crown jewel.

articles.title: SELECT THE RIGHT CLOUD SECURITY TOOLS
articles.summary: AWS experts offer a guide to choosing cloud security tools. Explore how to integrate third-party tools into your AWS stack for threat protection. Read the guide now [21] to find the best security solutions for your AWS environment.

articles.title: AWS, CLOUDFLARE, DIGITAL OCEAN, AND GOOGLE HELPED FEDS INVESTIGATE ALLEGED RAPPER BOT DDOS PERP
articles.summary: Federal authorities charged Oregon resident Ethan Foltz with operating the Rapper Bot DDoS network, which controlled 95,000 infected devices and launched over 370,000 attacks in just four months.

articles.title: MICHIGAN RURAL HEALTH SYSTEM NOTIFIES 140,000 ABOUT HACKING INCIDENT
articles.summary: A cyberattack on Aspire Rural Health in Michigan exposed the personal and healthcare data of nearly 140,000 patients, including Social Security numbers and medical records.

articles.title: OVER 2B GMAIL USERS AT RISK FOLLOWING DATABASE HACK
articles.summary: Hackers are using stolen data from Google's compromised Salesforce account to launch vishing attacks targeting Gmail and Google Cloud users.
